data.title: 国际服主线Vol.3 第四章后篇更新
data.summary: [Update Preview] On 2/14 (Tue), Main Story Volume 3, Eden Treaty Chapter 4: Kyrie of the Forgotten G
data.body:
[Update Preview]

On 2/14 (Tue), Main Story Volume 3, Eden Treaty Chapter 4: Kyrie of the Forgotten Gods Part 2 launches!
In the wake of Saori's one-on-one against Mika, what fate awaits her and Arius Squad?

#BlueArchive
